'''Garou Pack''' is a other item.

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Garou Pack}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
These leathery packs are carried around by garou warriors. They store rations, herbs and the spoils of battle inside. Crafted by elderly garou in the villages, or parents sending their child off to battle.
}}
